step_rationale: Membrane lipid in LDL aggregation; oxidative susceptibility in atherogenesis.
mechanism: Sphingomyelin alters LDL aggregation susceptibility and membrane integrity, contributing to lipid retention and oxidative modification in the atherosclerotic lesion.
